title: Owner Located - Found German Shepherd
summary: Thank you, the owner has been located!  Solebury Police officers responded to a call in the area of Honey Hollow Road and located a loose German Shepherd. The dog is safe and wants to get home. If you are the owner or know the owner please contact us at 215-328-8511.
